name: Candy Cane Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. In a large bowl, cream butter and confectioners' sugar with an electric beater on medium speed until light and fluffy.
3. Add egg, peppermint extract, and vanilla extract; beat until well blended.
4. Gradually add flour and salt; mix well.
5. Cover tightly with plastic wrap and chill for 1 hour.
6. Coat two baking sheets with nonstick cooking spray.
7. In a shallow bowl, combine crushed candy canes and granulated sugar; mix well.
8. Shape chilled dough into 1-inch balls and roll each in the candy cane mixture.
9. Place on baking sheets and bake for 10 to 12 minutes or until browned.
10. Remove from baking sheets immediately and place on wire racks to cool.
